violations.text: Raw animal foods eggs/beef were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (tomatoes) in the refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024
The ceiling was observed with chipping paint. Ceiling to be sealed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the all refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
Freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair(detached door handle). New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023

The floors in kitchen and back storage area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2023
The ceilings in the kitchen area is in poor repair(chipped paint). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2023
The vents on wall near handwashing sink have an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2023
